summary: Lane AH-005: Implemented lifecycle allowedTools runtime enforcement. Created PhaseGate service (packages/opencode/src/lifecycle/gate.ts) that holds the current lifecycle phase's allowedTools in a Ref. Modified lifecycle loop (loop.ts) to call PhaseGate.enterPhase on phase transitions and PhaseGate.exitPhase on lifecycle completion. Modified session/tools.ts to check PhaseGate.checkAllowed before executing any built-in tool, rejecting disallowed tools with a clear ToolError message. Uses Effect.serviceOption for backwards-compatible graceful fallback when PhaseGate is not in the Effect context. Typecheck passes with no new errors.
